svg.title: Ports → Adapters map (Pragmatic Clean Architecture)
svg.desc: Left column: outbound port Protocols declared in application/ports/. Right column: concrete adapters under infrastructure/ that implement each port. Composition root (bootstrap.py) chooses which adapter is wired per port at construction time. Adapters with no port (e.g. inventory_csv_writer) satisfy the de-facto ReportWriter Protocol structurally.
svg.text: application/ports/ Protocols (left) implemented by concrete adapters in infrastructure/ (right) · wired by bootstrap.py

g.text: tests use to stub out IO.
